subject: english
topic_title: Listening Skills: Listening to Grasp the Main Points
learning_objectives: Explain the purpose of listening for main points
Identify key ideas in a spoken passage
Respond to listening exercises based on the main idea

sections.heading: Focus
sections.content: The lesson develops listening skills, especially listening to grasp the main points in a passage or conversation.

sections.heading: Class Activity
sections.content: Students listen to the prescribed passage or telephone conversation and answer the exercises that follow, concentrating on the central ideas rather than isolated details.
